component.name: Note
component.description: Note composer / editor bottom sheet: vertical stack (`note-content`) with drag handle, body (back, header with icon + title + optional SESSION pill, subtitle, textarea), and **Button** (`1287:1563`) **Note** colorway — **Primary Note** (`1287:1562`) / **Primary+Delete Note** (`1287:1566`) — in `note-primary-action` / `note-footer`.

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: Note (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.content: note-content (VERTICAL auto layout, 16px gap, sheet padding)
figmaLayerNames.title: note-title
figmaLayerNames.subtitle: note-subtitle
figmaLayerNames.footer: note-footer (wraps INSTANCE `1287:1566` Button Primary+Delete Note as `note-footer-cta`)

codeProps.subtitle: optional override
codeProps.sessionLabel: optional session line when variant uses session copy

notes: 2026-04-07: Pull handle uses 20% primary tint vs other sheets’ subtle border — matches Figma `1279:349`.

2026-04-10: Renamed generic structural layers to kebab-case `note-*` slots (`note-content`, `note-header`, `note-title`, `note-session-pill`, `note-textarea`, `note-primary-action`, `note-delete-button`). Kept variant property strings unchanged; this is still a frame wrapper around component masters, not a new component set. No `flatten()` was introduced in automation.
findings: 2026-04-08: Component set `1279:351` — `VERTICAL` + `NO_WRAP`, 16px `itemSpacing`; `clipsContent` false on set and all five variant masters. Canvas already used kebab-case `note-*` layers (`note-content` → handle, body, primary/footer). React updated: `note-content` is the padded vertical stack; pull bar `note-drag-handle` (replacing misapplied `note-content` on the handle); `note-header` matches Figma siblings `note-title-icon`, `note-title` / `note-title-text`, optional `note-session-pill`. No `flatten()` in automation.

2026-04-08: Primary and edit footers use **Button** **Note** instances `1287:1562` / `1287:1566` from `1287:1563`. React: `FieldSoloCtaButton` (`notePrimary` / `notePrimaryWithDelete`). Material and Edit Job sheets use other **Property 1** colorways in the same set.
